title: Aspect Ratio Calculator - Screen & Image Dimensions
description: Free aspect ratio calculator. Calculate missing dimensions, resize images proportionally, and find common aspect ratios for screens and video.
keywords: aspect ratio calculator, screen ratio, image resize calculator, 16:9 calculator, video dimensions
intro: Calculate aspect ratios and find missing dimensions. Enter width and height, or one dimension with a ratio to find the other.

faq.a: Aspect ratio is the proportional relationship between width and height. Common ratios include 16:9 (widescreen), 4:3 (standard), and 1:1 (square).
1920×1080 has a 16:9 aspect ratio, which is the standard for HD and Full HD displays and most video content.

faq.q: How do I maintain aspect ratio when resizing?
faq.a: Multiply or divide both dimensions by the same factor. This calculator does it automatically - enter one dimension and the ratio.
